strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with full-stack and infrastructure expertise
Contributed to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective (open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform)
concerns: No AI-specific product/platform built as a primary focus (only AI-agent infrastructure contributions)
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI-related field
Limited cloud platform strategy experience (only mentions AWS CDK for pricing tooling, no cloud architecture leadership)
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong software engineering skills, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq and entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective. However, there is no evidence of building AI-powered products/platforms (only AI-agent tools), no advanced AI degree, and limited cloud platform strategy experience (only AWS CDK for a pricing tool). The entrepreneurial experience is a positive offset but insufficient to compensate for the lack of core AI product/platform leadership.
